nasb.text: Therefore I completely despaired of all the fruit of my labor for which I had labored under the sun.

esv.text: So I turned about and gave my heart up to despair over all the toil of my labors under the sun,

cnv.text: 於是我轉念，對日光之下我所勞碌的一切，心感絕望；

ccb.text: 因此，我对自己在日光之下一切的劳碌感到绝望。

csbs.text: 于是我回顾我在日光之下劳苦所做的一切工，就心感绝望；
